title: centaurea hortigena
intro: Centaurea hortigena, also known as Mountain Cornflower, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Centaurea hortigena include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Centaurea hortigena is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
